queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the contribution of having no checking account to increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of savings balances below 100 DM on the reduction of credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk mitigation associated with critical credit history or other existing credits.
